title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
